EXP_1.interpretation: Strict geometric isometry confirmed. Coordinate scaling works as expected. [SMOKE tier: theory verdict 'SUPPORTS' suppressed below declared fidelity floor; mechanical status 'PASS' retained]

EXP_1B.interpretation: System broke as expected under naive gamma scaling.

EXP_1C.interpretation: Zero-scaling hypothesis fails documented tolerances (drift and/or error-ratio). [SMOKE tier: theory verdict 'REFUTES' suppressed below declared fidelity floor; mechanical status 'FAIL' retained]

EXP_2.interpretation: No signal amplification. [SMOKE tier: theory verdict 'REFUTES' suppressed below declared fidelity floor; mechanical status 'FAIL' retained]

EXP_2B.interpretation: Residual deviation exceeds tolerance; rogue isolation not supported at this fidelity. [SMOKE tier: theory verdict 'REFUTES' suppressed below declared fidelity floor; mechanical status 'FAIL' retained]

EXP_3.interpretation: Beta=Pi hypothesis exploded to infinity as expected.

EXP_4.interpretation: Cannot resolve Translation vs Dilation at current fidelity (delta_error=0.55). Re-run at higher precision or wider K.

EXP_6.interpretation: Drift detected! Beta prefers 0.4300. [SMOKE tier: theory verdict 'REFUTES' suppressed below declared fidelity floor; mechanical status 'FAIL' retained]

EXP_7.interpretation: Sensitivity confirmed. Rogue signal amplifies monotonically with perturbation. [SMOKE tier: theory verdict 'SUPPORTS' suppressed below declared fidelity floor; mechanical status 'PASS' retained]

EXP_8.interpretation: Scaled-zeta zeros align with tau-scaled baseline zeros within adaptive tolerance. [SMOKE tier: theory verdict 'SUPPORTS' suppressed below declared fidelity floor; mechanical status 'PASS' retained]

gauge.reason: all decisive experiments support the theory (1/3)

lattice.reason: no experiments in this stage produced decisive data

brittleness.reason: no experiments in this stage produced decisive data

control.reason: all decisive experiments support the theory (1/1)
